# Vendored third-party scripts

These are checked in (not loaded from a CDN) so an ad-blocker, privacy
extension, corporate proxy, or a third-party CDN outage can't silently
break the page. Update by re-downloading the same versions:

| File                  | Source                                                          |
|------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------|
| three.module.js        | https://unpkg.com/three@0.160.0/build/three.module.js            |
| gsap.min.js            | https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.5/gsap.min.js    |
| ScrollTrigger.min.js   | https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.5/ScrollTrigger.min.js |
| d3.min.js              | https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/d3/7.9.0/d3.min.js         |
